## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature

## Product safety checklist

- [ ] This PR does not provide financial advice.
- [ ] This PR does not promise guaranteed profit.
- [ ] This PR does not use unsafe wording like “nên long ngay”, “kèo chắc”, or “đảm bảo lợi nhuận”.
- [ ] Futures/leverage UI includes risk warning where relevant.
- [ ] AI output is framed as scenarios and risk analysis.

## Engineering checklist

- [ ] I ran lint.
- [ ] I ran typecheck.
- [ ] I ran tests.
- [ ] I ran build.
- [ ] I added/updated tests where needed.
- [ ] I checked loading, empty, and error states.
- [ ] I checked mobile responsiveness.

## Security checklist

- [ ] No secrets are committed.
- [ ] API keys are server-only.
- [ ] User input is validated.
- [ ] Client does not pass trusted user_id.
- [ ] Supabase RLS assumptions are still valid.

Add screenshots for UI changes.
